intro.text: So you've made it. I'm Aren - Guild Master and Champion. I've watched your journey from the very beginning. Every badge, every battle, every choice. Now show me the trainer you've become. Hold nothing back!

win.text: I knew it. From the moment Sera brought you to my door, I knew you had this in you. You are the Champion now. The world of Horizons is yours to shape.

lose.text: Close, but not yet. The Champion's throne demands perfection. You have the heart - now sharpen the edge. I'll be waiting.
